results.title: ‘I plead for unity’ - Kwadwo Safo Akofena as he assumes leadership of Kristo Asafo
results.description: Nana Kwadwo Safo Akofena I, son of the late Apostle Kwadwo Safo Kantanka, has called for unity among members as he assumes leadership of the church as the newly installed head of the Kristo Asafo Mission of Ghana.

results.title: Germany Plans Pension Overhaul That Could Raise Retirement Age to Seventy
